nodes.name: Ashy tailorbird
nodes.summary: The ashy tailorbird (Orthotomus ruficeps) is a species of bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, it but now placed in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, the Philippines, Singapore, and Thailand, Vietnam. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest. References External links Image at ADW Archived 2008-05-15 at the Wayback Machine

nodes.summary: Orthotomus（Orthotomus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Rufous-fronted tailorbird、黑喉缝叶莺、柬埔寨缝叶莺等13种鸟类。
